_meta.scope: One-line role for every Python source file under src/netbox_auto/, web templates/static, top-level config + tooling files, and test files.

src/netbox_auto/.cli.py: Typer CLI entry point — registers commands (discover, serve, push, status), loads config in callback, calls init_db, and renders rich console output. Console-script `netbox-auto` points at `cli:app`
src/netbox_auto/.config.py: Pydantic v2 + pydantic-settings configuration — MikroTikConfig, SwitchConfig, ProxmoxConfig, NetBoxConfig, UnboundConfig (list of UnboundHostConfig), ScannerConfig, plus a top-level Config with discovery.include_ipv6 toggle. YAML loader merged with env-var overrides under prefix NETBOX_AUTO_<SECTION>__<FIELD>
src/netbox_auto/.database.py: SQLAlchemy 2.0 engine + sessionmaker for the SQLite staging DB (default netbox-auto.db); init_db() creates tables, get_session() returns a fresh Session
src/netbox_auto/.models.py: SQLAlchemy 2.0 ORM with Mapped/mapped_column. Base + DiscoveryRun + Host tables. Status/source/type enums (DiscoveryStatus, HostSource={dhcp,proxmox,scan,manual}, HostStatus={pending,approved,rejected,pushed}, HostType={server,workstation,iot,network,unknown}). Host.mac unique-indexed
src/netbox_auto/.discovery.py: Orchestrator — run_discovery() creates a DiscoveryRun, runs DHCP/Proxmox/Scanner collectors plus Switch collector for MAC-to-port mappings, merges hosts by lowercased MAC, picks hostname by priority (DHCP>Proxmox>Scan), filters IPv6 unless include_ipv6, persists to Host table. Returns DiscoveryResult(total, new, updated, errors)
src/netbox_auto/.reconcile.py: Reconciliation between staging DB and existing NetBox inventory — import_netbox_devices() pulls existing devices/VMs into the staging DB; reconcile_hosts() classifies each as new / matched / stale relative to NetBox
src/netbox_auto/.push.py: push_approved_hosts(dry_run, skip_netbox, skip_dns) — iterates Host rows with status=APPROVED, creates NetBox device/VM + cable records via netbox.py, updates DNS via dns.py, marks host PUSHED. Returns counts and per-server DNS update list
src/netbox_auto/.netbox.py: pynetbox wrapper with lazy connection — device/VM CRUD, IP-address creation, cable creation. Connects on first use, not at __init__
src/netbox_auto/.dns.py: Generates Unbound local-data records and pushes via paramiko SSH, atomically replacing the configured local.conf path on each Unbound host listed in config
src/netbox_auto/.collectors/__init__.py: Re-exports DHCPCollector, ProxmoxCollector, ScannerCollector, SwitchCollector, DiscoveredHost, Collector
src/netbox_auto/.collectors/base.py: Collector Protocol (name + collect()) and DiscoveredHost dataclass (mac normalized to lowercase colon-separated, hostname, ip_addresses, source, switch_port). MAC normalization in __post_init__
src/netbox_auto/.collectors/dhcp.py: MikroTik DHCP-lease collector via librouteros API (port 8728 by default); yields DiscoveredHost with source=DHCP, hostname from lease comment/host-name
src/netbox_auto/.collectors/proxmox.py: Proxmox VM collector via proxmoxer — enumerates qemu+lxc guests across nodes, reads MAC from VM config and IPs from guest agent (if available); source=PROXMOX
src/netbox_auto/.collectors/scanner.py: Scapy-based ARP scanner for static IPs across configured subnets (requires root for raw sockets); source=SCAN
src/netbox_auto/.collectors/switch.py: MikroTik switch MAC-table collector — returns dict[mac -> '<switch_name>:<port>'] used by discovery.py to fill Host.switch_port
src/netbox_auto/.web/app.py: Flask app factory + Blueprint 'main'. Routes: GET /, GET /hosts, POST /hosts/<id>/status, POST /hosts/<id>/type, POST /hosts/bulk, GET /reconcile, POST /reconcile/import
src/netbox_auto/.web/templates/base.html: Base Jinja layout (header, flash messages, content block)
src/netbox_auto/.web/templates/hosts.html: Hosts table with inline status/type forms and bulk-action form
src/netbox_auto/.web/templates/reconcile.html: Reconciliation view (new vs matched vs stale relative to NetBox) with import action

tests/.unit/test_config.py: Unit tests for Pydantic config loading and env-var overrides
tests/.unit/test_models.py: Unit tests for ORM enums and Host/DiscoveryRun behavior
tests/.unit/test_discovery.py: Unit tests for discovery orchestration (hostname priority, MAC merge, IPv6 filter)
tests/.integration/test_collectors.py: Integration tests for collectors (mocks for librouteros / proxmoxer / scapy)
tests/.integration/test_dns.py: Integration tests for the Unbound DNS push path
tests/.integration/test_netbox.py: Integration tests for the pynetbox wrapper

/.pyproject.toml: Build + project metadata. Console-script `netbox-auto = netbox_auto.cli:app`. Deps: typer[all], pyyaml, pydantic + pydantic-settings, sqlalchemy 2, librouteros, proxmoxer, requests, scapy, flask, pynetbox, paramiko. Dev: black, ruff, mypy strict, pytest. Black/Ruff line-length=100, target py311
/.config.example.yaml: Template for config.yaml — mikrotik/proxmox/netbox/unbound/scanner/switches sections plus discovery.include_ipv6 toggle
/.README.md: User-facing documentation — installation, configuration, CLI reference
/.CLAUDE.md: Claude Code project guidance — data flow, module structure, key patterns (MAC correlation, source priority, lazy connections, env-var secrets)
/..gitignore: Standard Python gitignore + the staging SQLite DB
/..github/workflows/ci.yml: GitHub Actions CI workflow — runs `make ci`
/.images/netbox_auto.png: Web UI screenshot referenced from README
